SEARCH
Package com.dua3.utility.awt

Interface AwtImage

All Superinterfaces:
Image, RenderedImage, Storable
All Known Implementing Classes:
AwtMutableImage, AwtStandardImage
public interface AwtImage extends Image, RenderedImage
An interface that represents an image using the Swing BufferedImage API. It implements the Image interface.

  • Method Summary

    Methods inherited from interface com.dua3.utility.data.Image

    defaultExtension, getArgb, height, mimeType, width, write

    Methods inherited from interface java.awt.image.RenderedImage

    copyData, getColorModel, getData, getData, getHeight, getMinTileX, getMinTileY, getMinX, getMinY, getNumXTiles, getNumYTiles, getProperty, getPropertyNames, getSampleModel, getSources, getTile, getTileGridXOffset, getTileGridYOffset, getTileHeight, getTileWidth, getWidth
